title: Setup Controller Menu
description:
Setup Controller Menu

System Configuration Command (Setup menu)

The [System Configuration] command opens a dialog that contains several pages that are used to configure the system for the Epson RC+ 8.0 environment. To open the [System Configuration] dialog box, select [Setup]-[Preferences].

Common buttons

Item	Description

Close	Close
		 the [System Configuration] dialog. Pressing the [Close] button
		 after changing the system configuration will reset the Controller
		 to a startup state.

Apply	Saves
		 changes.

The Controller may reset to enable the
		 new settings.

Restore	Revert
		 back to previous values.
